chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 2639 of 2019. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.05.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. None present. Petitioner being an employee of Irrigation Department sought a declaration that concerns his date of birth. We are afraid that under the provisions of Estacode and in terms of the recent pronouncement of Honourable Supreme Court, such statistics of the employee which were provided at the time of initial appointment cannot be altered at the twilight of the career. Such being the situation we are not inclined to entertain this petition and is being dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
